title: Sales Consultant (Spa/Hair/Aesthetics)
description:
As a Sales Consultant, you will be responsible for driving the sales and revenue growth of our clinic's services and products. You will be the first point of contact for our clients and will work closely with them to understand their needs and recommend the most appropriate treatments and products to achieve their desired results.


Major Job Scope:

  • Build strong relationships with new and existing clients to increase sales and repeat business
  • Conduct consultations with clients to understand their needs and recommend the most suitable treatments and products
  • Provide excellent customer service to ensure a positive customer experience
  • Meet and exceed sales targets and KPIs set by the management
  • Work closely with the clinic's team to ensure clients receive the best treatment recommendations and advice
  • Manage and update the clinic's customer database and ensure all client information is accurate and up-to-date
  • Assist in implementing sales and marketing strategies to increase the clinic's customer base and revenue
  • Ensure all sales and marketing activities comply with regulatory and ethical standards

Requirements:

  • Sales experience, preferably in a similar industry
  • Excellent communication, interpersonal, and customer service skills
  • Strong ability to build and maintain relationships with clients
  • Ability to work in a fast-paced environment and meet sales targets
  • Knowledge of the beauty and aesthetics industry is an advantage
  • Able to work retail hours, including weekends and public holidays

If you are a results-driven individual who is passionate about the beauty, hair and aesthetics industry and can provide exceptional customer service, we welcome you to apply for this exciting opportunity.


Work Location: Multiple branches around Singapore

Work Schedule: 5-7 off days a month

Perks: Commission! No OT, employee discounts!


Salary, title and other details are for reference and may not reflect the final offer.

postedCompany.description:
Since 1997, HAACH has been a cornerstone of beauty and wellness in Singapore, redefining the boundaries of premium spa and skincare services. Celebrating our 27th anniversary in 2024, we are renowned for our commitment to excellence, consistently receiving "Best in Beauty" awards from prestigious publications such as Her World, Harper’s Bazaar, Elle, Women's Weekly, and Cleo. Our mission is to empower our clients to achieve their skincare goals by delivering exceptional and transformative experiences.


Philosophy:


At HAACH, we believe in achieving beauty through a harmonious balance of innovative science and refined relaxation techniques. Each treatment is tailored to optimize skin health, driven by proprietary protocols developed from decades of expertise. Our approach ensures that every visit not only rejuvenates the skin but also restores the spirit, making us the enduring choice for those seeking effective skincare solutions in a serene environment.


Mission:


Our mission is to blend cutting-edge scientific research with luxurious spa treatments to provide real results. We utilize the latest technologies and therapeutic techniques to create personalized experiences that address each client's unique skin concerns—from age-defying to pigmentation correction and acne treatments.
postedCompany.name: HAACH LIFESTYLE HMH PTE. LTD.
